SHORT NAME: HCFASPCL 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_SPCLTY 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 00 = Carrier wide 
01 = General practice 
02 = General surgery 
03 = Allergy/immunology 
04 = Otolaryngology 
05 = Anesthesiology 
06 = Cardiology 
07 = Dermatology 
08 = Family practice 
09 = Interventional pain management
